name: Massing at Twilight
text:
Void role only.
While resolving conflicts at this province, each character counts its combined [mil] and [pol] skill.

name: Crisis Breaker
text:
Keeper role only.
Action: During a [mil] conflict, if your opponent counts more current [mil] skill than you, choose a Berserker character you control – ready that character and move it to the conflict.

name: Yasuki Taka
text: Reaction: After a  character leaves play during the conflict phase – gain 1 fate. (Unlimited.)

name: Origami Master
text:
Pride.
Action: Choose another character you control – move an honored status token from this character to the chosen character.

name: Itinerant Philosopher
text: Action: While this character is participating in a conflict, discard the Imperial Favor. Choose an opponent's participating character with 1 or more attachments – bow that character.

name: Miwaku Kabe Guard
text: Pride. (After this character wins a conflict, honor it. After this character loses a conflict, dishonor it.)

name: Henshin Disciple
text:
While you have claimed or are contesting:
the [air] ring, this character gets +2[pol].
the [earth] ring, this character gets +2[mil].
the [fire] ring, this character gains pride.

name: Master of Gisei Toshi
text: Reaction: After the conflict phase begins, choose a ring – while that ring is contested this phase, non-Spell events cannot be played.

name: Moto Juro
text: Action: Select one – move this character into a conflict or move this character home from a conflict. (Limit twice per round.)

name: Seppun Ishikawa
text: This character gets +1[mil] and +1[pol] for each other Imperial card you control.

name: Fair Accord
text: Action: During the dynasty phase, discard the Imperial Favor – gain 2 fate.

name: Young Harrier
text: Action: Dishonor this character – each  character you control cannot be dishonored until the end of the phase.

name: Test of Skill
text:
Seeker role only.
Action: Name a card type. Reveal the top 3 cards of your conflict deck (top 4 cards instead if you control a Duelist character) – add up to 2 revealed cards of that type to your hand and discard the rest.

name: The Stone of Sorrows
text:
Seeker role only.
While attached character is ready, opponents cannot remove or gain fate from rings.

name: Seal of the Lion
text: Attached character gains the  clan symbol and the Commander trait.

name: Consumed by Five Fires
text:
Seeker role only.
Action: If you control a Shugenja character – remove up to 5 fate from among characters an opponent controls.

name: Cunning Magistrate
text: While this character is participating in a conflict, each other character that is dishonored does not count its skill toward the resolution of this conflict.

name: A Fate Worse Than Death
text: Action: During a conflict, choose a participating character – bow that character, move it home, dishonor it, and remove 1 fate from it. Until the end of the phase, treat its printed text box as if it were blank (except for Traits).

name: Ride Them Down
text: Action: During a conflict, discard the Imperial Favor – set the base strength of the attacked province to 1 until the end of the conflict.

name: Waning Hostilities
text: Reaction: After the conflict phase begins – each player has only one opportunity to declare a conflict this phase.
